The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Document Library
Status
Response Codes ISO 20022 Integration
9347
Added error codes 205, 375, 397, and 446.
Error code 205 means that the transaction was already submitted (committed).
Error code 375 means that the transaction ID doesnât match the value in the corresponding initiate payment.
Error code 397 means that this is a duplicate transaction ID (participant transaction reference number).
Error code 446 means that the transaction was already reversed (rolled back).
Revised
CAS Online User Request
2513
We added a new request type to this form. The form now offers a request type for when a CAS Online User requires additional account access due to a merger between financial institutions.
Revised
